_comment: OPERATOR-EDITABLE (reach-channels charter, records/2026-07-14_reach_channels_charter_RATIFIED.md). Which feeds/lists are IN is the operator's curation act (pond-naming). No feed may be added that requires ranking to be useful. trade_press URLs verified live 2026-07-14 (curl -> HTTP 200, parseable RSS 2.0): Utility Dive, Fierce Network (the successor brand of Fierce Telecom -- fiercetelecom.com itself now 403s behind Cloudflare), FreightWaves. Feed swap 2026-07-15 (ratified): Chemical & Engineering News REMOVED; Chemical Industry Digest (chemicals business) + Smart Water Magazine /rss/news (water/desalination) verified live 2026-07-15 (curl -> HTTP 200, parseable RSS 2.0 via digest.parse_feed, fresh items 2026-07-14). Mining slot EMPTY: Mining.com /feed 403 (Cloudflare, even browser UA) and MiningWeekly RSS paths 403, verified failed 2026-07-15. Also failed 2026-07-15: WaterWorld (404 on all RSS paths), ICIS explore feed (parseable but zero items), ChemAnalyst (HTML, not a feed), Desalination.biz (parseable RSS but newest item 2026-04 -- passed over for the fresher Smart Water Magazine). orphan_watch.cohort_limit widened 40 -> 500 (ratified 2026-07-15): effectively uncapped for the current ~448-issuer window -- the first run's cap silently cost ~90% of the channel's reach; the explicit dropped-count note still fires whenever it binds again.
_comment_newsletters: newsletters channel: operator-curated 2026-07-16 (the pond-naming act; ACTIVATION DATE 2026-07-16 per charter section 1 -- prune/yield clocks run from here). 19 sources delivered; 15 feeds live-verified 2026-07-16 (HTTP 200 under BOTH a browser UA and the harness's own DEFAULT_USER_AGENT, parseable via digest.parse_feed, newest item fresh: 13 feeds 2026-07-15, Construction Physics 2026-07-11, Bright Spots 2026-07-12, MCJ 2026-07-01). NO FEED FOUND, reported not pinned (verified failed 2026-07-16): The Fiber Optic Association (static HTML site, no RSS -- foanewsletter.xml/rss.xml/feed all 404, no autodiscovery link), Flexport Global Logistics Update (email-only -- /global-logistics-update/feed/, /feed/, /blog/feed/, /rss.xml all 404, no autodiscovery), Grid Brief (beehiiv publication with RSS not enabled -- site config rss_feed_map null; /feed /rss /rss.xml /feed.xml /atom.xml all 404), SpaceNexus Weekly Brief (no feed at any standard path, no autodiscovery, no newsletter-platform embed). Derivation notes: Chilling Realities rides the whole MCJ newsletter feed (the operator's link was a single post); IAEA Bulletin has no per-issue feed -- pinned the site-wide /feeds/news which carries Bulletin articles (/feeds/topnews exists but its items are undated); World Nuclear Association pinned via its news arm world-nuclear-news.org/rss; Mining Magazine feed discovered via robots.txt (/feeds/rss, Aspermont platform); Broadband Breakfast /feed/ 301s to /rss/ (pinned the canonical); e-mj.com 301s to www.e-mj.com (pinned the canonical).
